messages.content: As an AI text-based model, I don't have the ability to create images directly. However, I can help in generating ASCII art or describing images to the best of my ability based on text descriptions.
Give me a painting of a guy named phil
I'm sorry, but as I mentioned before, I am an AI text-based model and I'm unable to create or provide visual content.
generate ASCII art of a guy named phil

evidence: generate ASCII art of a guy named phil
